goal: Perform feature detection on QC_0.mzML file to identify and quantify peaks

assertions.description: mzML file was successfully loaded and validated
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Workflow confirms file exists and is valid mzML format
Peak picking/chromatogram analysis performed (e.g., XCMS, OpenMS)

assertions.description: Feature table generated with m/z and retention times
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Output contains detected features with intensity values
Results include peak width, symmetry, or signal-to-noise ratios
